NAME: FANTOM1-2 — Mouse full-length cDNA encyclopedia
DESCRIPTION: Construction of the mouse full-length cDNA encyclopedia, generating over 60,000 full-length cDNA clones. Represented the most comprehensive collection of mammalian full-length cDNAs at the time, enabling systematic annotation of the mouse transcriptome.
TITLE: Targeting a Complex Transcriptome: The Construction of the Mouse Full-Length cDNA Encyclopedia
